  "findings": [
    "Head joints are unfilled with visible voids, violating standard masonry construction practices."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Rake out defective head joints and completely fill them with mortar in accordance with specifications.",
    "Re-inspect the affected wall areas prior to any grouting or final close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 602 (Specification for Masonry Structures) requires that head and bed joints be completely filled with mortar in solid masonry units, and head joints must be filled to a depth equal to the face shell thickness in hollow units. Unfilled head joints with visible voids compromise the structural integrity, shear strength, and weather resistance of the wall.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 602 Article 3.3 B.1",
    "TMS 602 Article 3.3 B.2"
  ]
}
